root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ,sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_name ,sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_surname ,sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_id ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ,sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_mobile_phone ,sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_remark ,sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_prename ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename ,sc_mem_m_member_aml
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name = sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_name and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname = sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_surname and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no asc,sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_date asc
